headline: Liveries and race day
body:
RACE DAY IS HERE
Pre-Race Briefing:
Please ensure you have reviewed the rules. You should be in the server by 8:50 PM for a 9:00 PM start.

Server Password: Swindon

Livery Downloads: Here https://drive.google.com/file/d/1Hv9Ybh3hcnIBtMFTgBGcp-9lx4Z8UDJI/view?usp=sharing

headline: Latest Odds
body:
All eyes are on the grid as the upcoming league looms, and it’s Oliver Record who leads the pack as the clear favourite. Calm, consistent, and annoyingly quick—he’s the one to beat.

Hot on his heels is Ryan Drew, a man with pace and something to prove. Lurking just behind, the Ashworth brothers—Ryan Ashworth and Dene Ashworth—are ready to turn the championship into a family affair.

And then… there’s Neil Hinder unable to drive in real life and old as hell.

Officially listed. Statistically present. Spiritually… still figuring out which pedal does what. The bookies aren’t convinced—but chaos has a funny way of rewriting odds.

Full Odds:
Oliver Record – 5/4
Ryan Drew – 3/1
Ryan Ashworth – 5/1
Dene Ashworth – 6/1
Neil Hinder – 10/1

One thing’s certain: reputations will be tested, egos will be bruised, and someone’s walking away a champion.

Let’s see who backs it up on track.

headline: Calendar Added
body: Calendar added to the website to make it easier for everyone involved to look at, this includes all of the times Qualifying starts.
